scores.notes: OCR output closely matches ground truth with very minor differences such as the initial '?' character before 'iv.' and minor punctuation differences (e.g., curly quotes replaced by straight quotes). No tables were present, so table structure is fully preserved. Numeric data and section numbering are exact. Layout and reading order are well maintained. Completeness is slightly reduced due to the extraneous '?' at the start and minor formatting differences, but no major text is missing.
